mapper.sql: select manuscript_id, file_no, title, author_ids, author_names, corresponding_author, corresponding_email, abstract, keywords, manuscript_type, word_count, fund_project, fund_no, status, receive_time, assign_time, review_start_time, review_end_time, conclusion, conclusion_time, editor_id, editor_name, audit_count, revision_count, is_deleted, delete_time, delete_by, archive_time, publish_time, issue_id, page_start, page_end, file_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from editor_manuscript
mapper.select:
select m.manuscript_id, m.file_no, m.title, m.author_names, m.receive_time, m.conclusion_time, m.conclusion, m.status, i.year, i.period, c.column_name, datediff(m.conclusion_time, m.receive_time) as audit_cycle_days from editor_manuscript m left join publisher_article a on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_issue i on i.issue_id = ifnull(a.issue_id, m.issue_id) left join publisher_column c on c.column_id = a.column_id
m.conclusion_time is not null AND (m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
AND m.file_no like concat('%', #{fileNo}, '%')
AND m.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND m.author_names like concat('%', #{authorNames}, '%')
AND m.status = #{status}
AND m.conclusion like concat('%', #{conclusion}, '%')
AND i.year = #{year}
AND i.period = #{period}
AND c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
AND date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by m.receive_time desc

select m.manuscript_id, m.file_no, m.title, m.author_names, m.status, i.year, i.period, c.column_name, ifnull(a.page_start, m.page_start) as page_start, ifnull(a.page_end, m.page_end) as page_end, i.publish_date as paper_publish_time, coalesce(a.publish_time, m.publish_time) as online_publish_time from editor_manuscript m left join publisher_article a on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_issue i on i.issue_id = ifnull(a.issue_id, m.issue_id) left join publisher_column c on c.column_id = a.column_id
(m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2') AND ( i.issue_id is not null OR a.article_id is not null OR m.publish_time is not null OR m.status in ('06', '08', '09') )
AND m.file_no like concat('%', #{fileNo}, '%')
AND m.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND m.author_names like concat('%', #{authorNames}, '%')
AND m.status = #{status}
AND i.year = #{year}
AND i.period = #{period}
AND c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
AND date_format(coalesce(a.publish_time, m.publish_time, i.publish_date),'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(coalesce(a.publish_time, m.publish_time, i.publish_date),'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by coalesce(a.publish_time, m.publish_time, i.publish_date) desc, m.manuscript_id desc

select m.manuscript_id, m.file_no, m.title, m.author_names, m.editor_name, m.conclusion_time, m.conclusion, m.status, m.editor_name as responsible_editor, m.assign_time, i.year, i.period, c.column_name, datediff(m.conclusion_time, m.assign_time) as edit_process_cycle_days from editor_manuscript m left join publisher_article a on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_issue i on i.issue_id = ifnull(a.issue_id, m.issue_id) left join publisher_column c on c.column_id = a.column_id
m.assign_time is not null AND m.conclusion_time is not null AND (m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
AND m.file_no like concat('%', #{fileNo}, '%')
AND m.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND m.author_names like concat('%', #{authorNames}, '%')
AND m.editor_name like concat('%', #{editorName}, '%')
AND m.editor_name like concat('%', #{responsibleEditor}, '%')
AND m.status = #{status}
AND m.conclusion like concat('%', #{conclusion}, '%')
AND i.year = #{year}
AND i.period = #{period}
AND c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
AND date_format(m.assign_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(m.assign_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by m.assign_time desc

select a.audit_id, m.manuscript_id, m.file_no, m.title, m.author_names, a.reviewer_name, c.column_name, a.review_round, m.receive_time, a.invite_time, a.audit_time, a.audit_result, m.status, datediff(a.audit_time, a.invite_time) as review_cycle_days from editor_audit a inner join editor_manuscript m on m.manuscript_id = a.manuscript_id left join publisher_article pa on pa.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_column c on c.column_id = pa.column_id
a.invite_time is not null AND a.audit_time is not null AND (a.is_deleted is null or a.is_deleted != '2') AND (m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
AND m.file_no like concat('%', #{fileNo}, '%')
AND m.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND m.author_names like concat('%', #{authorNames}, '%')
AND a.reviewer_name like concat('%', #{reviewerName}, '%')
AND m.status = #{status}
AND c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
AND a.audit_result = #{auditResult}
AND a.review_round = #{reviewRound}
AND date_format(a.invite_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(a.invite_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by a.invite_time desc, a.audit_id desc

select e.edit_id, m.manuscript_id, m.file_no, m.title, m.author_names, m.status, ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), m.editor_name) as editor_name, e.edit_end_time, e.edit_start_time, e.edit_status, i.year, i.period, c.column_name, datediff(e.edit_end_time, e.edit_start_time) as edit_article_cycle_days from editor_edit e inner join editor_manuscript m on m.manuscript_id = e.manuscript_id left join publisher_article a on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id left join publisher_issue i on i.issue_id = ifnull(a.issue_id, m.issue_id) left join publisher_column c on c.column_id = a.column_id
e.edit_end_time is not null AND e.edit_start_time is not null AND (m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
AND m.file_no like concat('%', #{fileNo}, '%')
AND m.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
AND m.author_names like concat('%', #{authorNames}, '%')
AND m.status = #{status}
AND ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), m.editor_name) like concat('%', #{editorName}, '%')
AND e.edit_status = #{editStatus}
AND i.year = #{year}
AND i.period = #{period}
AND c.column_name like concat('%', #{columnName}, '%')
AND date_format(e.edit_end_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(e.edit_end_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by e.edit_end_time desc

select count(*) as receiveCount, sum(case when m.status = '08' or m.publish_time is not null then 1 else 0 end) as publishCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' then 1 else 0 end) as rejectCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' and not exists ( select 1 from editor_manuscript_log l where l.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id and l.log_type = '03' ) then 1 else 0 end) as initialRejectCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' and exists ( select 1 from editor_manuscript_log l where l.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id and l.log_type = '03' ) and ifnull(m.revision_count, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as reviewRejectCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' and ifnull(m.revision_count, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as reReviewRejectCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' and exists ( select 1 from editor_manuscript_log l where l.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id and l.log_type = '07' ) then 1 else 0 end) as finalRejectCount, sum(case when m.status in ('06', '08', '09') then 1 else 0 end) as adoptCount, sum(case when m.review_start_time is not null or exists ( select 1 from editor_manuscript_log l where l.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id and l.log_type = '03' ) then 1 else 0 end) as sendReviewCount, sum(case when m.fund_project is not null and m.fund_project != '' then 1 else 0 end) as fundCount, ( select count(*) from editor_manuscript_log l inner join editor_manuscript m2 on m2.manuscript_id = l.manuscript_id where l.log_type = '02' and (m2.is_deleted is null or m2.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(l.operate_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(l.operate_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
) as initialReviewTimes, ( select count(*) from editor_audit a inner join editor_manuscript m3 on m3.manuscript_id = a.manuscript_id where (a.is_deleted is null or a.is_deleted != '2') and (m3.is_deleted is null or m3.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
) as peerReviewTimes, ( select count(*) from editor_audit a inner join editor_manuscript m4 on m4.manuscript_id = a.manuscript_id where ifnull(a.review_round, 1) > 1 and (a.is_deleted is null or a.is_deleted != '2') and (m4.is_deleted is null or m4.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
) as reReviewTimes, ( select count(*) from editor_manuscript_log l inner join editor_manuscript m5 on m5.manuscript_id = l.manuscript_id where l.log_type in ('07', '08') and (m5.is_deleted is null or m5.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(l.operate_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(l.operate_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
) as finalReviewTimes from editor_manuscript m
(m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')

select m.editor_id as editorId, case when m.editor_id is null then '未分配' when ifnull(m.editor_name, '') = '' then '未分配' else m.editor_name end as editorName, ifnull(d.dept_name, '') as deptName, count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when m.status in ('01', '02') then 1 else 0 end) as notSentCount, sum(case when m.status = '04' then 1 else 0 end) as reviseCount, sum(case when m.status = '05' then 1 else 0 end) as resubmittedCount, sum(case when m.status = '03' and ifnull(a.pending_count, 0) = 0 and ifnull(a.returned_count, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as reviewingCount, sum(case when m.status = '03' and ifnull(a.pending_count, 0) = 0 and ifnull(a.returned_count, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as returnedCount, sum(case when m.status = '03' and ifnull(a.pending_count, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as notReturnedCount, sum(case when m.status = '06' then 1 else 0 end) as adoptCount, sum(case when m.status = '07' then 1 else 0 end) as rejectCount, sum(case when m.status in ('08', '09') then 1 else 0 end) as publishCount from editor_manuscript m left join sys_user u on u.user_id = m.editor_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = u.dept_id and d.del_flag = '0' left join ( select manuscript_id, sum(case when audit_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as pending_count, sum(case when audit_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as returned_count from editor_audit where is_deleted is null or is_deleted != '2' group by manuscript_id ) a on a.manuscript_id = m.manuscript_id
(m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(
m.assign_time m.review_start_time m.conclusion_time m.publish_time m.receive_time
,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(
m.assign_time m.review_start_time m.conclusion_time m.publish_time m.receive_time
,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
group by m.editor_id, m.editor_name, d.dept_name order by case when m.editor_id is null then 0 else 1 end, m.editor_name

select coalesce(e.editor_id, m.editor_id) as editorId, case when coalesce(e.editor_id, m.editor_id) is null then '未分配' when ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), ifnull(m.editor_name, '')) = '' then '未分配' else ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), m.editor_name) end as editorName, sum(case when e.edit_status in ('0', '1') then 1 else 0 end) as editUnfinishedCount, sum(case when e.edit_status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as editFinishedCount, sum(case when e.edit_status in ('0', '1') then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0)) else 0 end) as editUnfinishedWords, sum(case when e.edit_status = '2' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as editFinishedWords, sum(case when e.edit_status = '2' and (s.layout_file_path is null or s.layout_file_path = '') then 1 else 0 end) as layoutUnfinishedCount, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' then 1 else 0 end) as layoutFinishedCount, sum(case when e.edit_status = '2' and (s.layout_file_path is null or s.layout_file_path = '') then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as layoutUnfinishedWords, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as layoutFinishedWords, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and ifnull(s.sign_status, '0') = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as proofUnfinishedCount, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and s.sign_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as proofFinishedCount, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and ifnull(s.sign_status, '0') = '0' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as proofUnfinishedWords, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and s.sign_status = '1' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as proofFinishedWords, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and ifnull(s.sign_status, '0') = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as finalizeUnfinishedCount, sum(case when s.sign_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as finalizeFinishedCount, sum(case when s.layout_file_path is not null and s.layout_file_path != '' and ifnull(s.sign_status, '0') = '0' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as finalizeUnfinishedWords, sum(case when s.sign_status = '1' then ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_after, 0), ifnull(nullif(e.word_count_before, 0), ifnull(m.word_count, 0))) else 0 end) as finalizeFinishedWords from editor_edit e inner join editor_manuscript m on m.manuscript_id = e.manuscript_id left join editor_sign s on s.manuscript_id = e.manuscript_id
(m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(
ifnull(e.edit_start_time, e.create_time) e.create_time
case when e.edit_status = '2' and e.edit_end_time is not null then e.edit_end_time else ifnull(e.edit_start_time, e.create_time) end
,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(
ifnull(e.edit_start_time, e.create_time) e.create_time
case when e.edit_status = '2' and e.edit_end_time is not null then e.edit_end_time else ifnull(e.edit_start_time, e.create_time) end
,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
group by coalesce(e.editor_id, m.editor_id), case when coalesce(e.editor_id, m.editor_id) is null then '未分配' when ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), ifnull(m.editor_name, '')) = '' then '未分配' else ifnull(nullif(e.editor_name, ''), m.editor_name) end order by (editorId is null), editorName

select u.user_id as userId, u.user_name as userName, coalesce(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), nullif(au.real_name, ''), nullif(rv.real_name, ''), u.user_name) as realName, coalesce(nullif(au.affiliation, ''), nullif(rv.affiliation, ''), '') as affiliation, coalesce(nullif(u.email, ''), nullif(au.email, ''), nullif(rv.email, ''), '') as email, ifnull(sub.submission_count, 0) as submissionCount, ifnull(sub.publish_count, 0) as publishCount, ifnull(rev.review_manuscript_count, 0) as reviewManuscriptCount, ifnull(rev.review_times, 0) as reviewTimes, ifnull(rev.completed_count, 0) as completedReviewCount, ifnull(rev.score_avg, 0) as reviewScoreAvg, ifnull(rev.accepted_count, 0) as acceptedCount from sys_user u left join editor_author au on au.user_id = u.user_id and (au.is_deleted is null or au.is_deleted != '2') left join editor_reviewer rv on rv.user_id = u.user_id and (rv.is_deleted is null or rv.is_deleted != '2') left join ( select ea.user_id, count(distinct m.manuscript_id) as submission_count, count(distinct case when m.status in ('08', '09') or m.publish_time is not null then m.manuscript_id end) as publish_count from editor_author ea inner join editor_manuscript m on find_in_set(ea.author_id, m.author_ids) where ea.user_id is not null and (ea.is_deleted is null or ea.is_deleted != '2') and (m.is_deleted is null or m.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(m.receive_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
group by ea.user_id ) sub on sub.user_id = u.user_id left join ( select er.user_id, count(distinct a.manuscript_id) as review_manuscript_count, count(a.audit_id) as review_times, sum(case when a.audit_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as completed_count, round(avg(a.audit_score), 1) as score_avg, sum(case when a.audit_time is not null or a.audit_status in ('1', '2', '3') then 1 else 0 end) as accepted_count from editor_reviewer er inner join editor_audit a on a.reviewer_id = er.reviewer_id where er.user_id is not null and (er.is_deleted is null or er.is_deleted != '2') and (a.is_deleted is null or a.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
group by er.user_id ) rev on rev.user_id = u.user_id
u.del_flag = '0' and (au.author_id is not null or rv.reviewer_id is not null)
and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(u.nick_name, ''), nullif(au.real_name, ''), nullif(rv.real_name, '')) like concat('%', #{realName}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(u.email, ''), nullif(au.email, ''), nullif(rv.email, '')) like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
and ifnull(sub.submission_count, 0) > 0
and ifnull(rev.review_manuscript_count, 0) > 0
order by (ifnull(sub.submission_count, 0) + ifnull(rev.review_times, 0)) desc, u.user_id

select rv.reviewer_id as reviewerId, rv.user_id as userId, coalesce(nullif(u.user_name, ''), nullif(rv.email, ''), '') as userName, coalesce(nullif(rv.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nick_name, ''), '') as realName, ifnull(rv.affiliation, '') as affiliation, coalesce(nullif(rv.mobile, ''), nullif(rv.phone, ''), nullif(u.phonenumber, ''), '') as mobile, coalesce(nullif(rv.email, ''), nullif(u.email, ''), '') as email, '' as idCard, ifnull(rv.expertise_fields, '') as expertiseFields, ifnull(rv.research_direction, '') as searchKeywords, ifnull(rv.status, '') as permissionLevel, ifnull(rv.accept_rate, 0) as reputation, ifnull(agg.returned_count, 0) as returnedCount, ifnull(agg.re_review_returned_count, 0) as reReviewReturnedCount, ifnull(agg.returned_manuscript_count, 0) as returnedManuscriptCount, ifnull(agg.review_cycle_days, 0) as reviewCycleDays, ifnull(agg.score_avg, ifnull(rv.review_score_avg, 0)) as reviewScoreAvg, ifnull(agg.return_rate, 0) as returnRate, 0 as reviewFee from editor_reviewer rv left join sys_user u on u.user_id = rv.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join ( select a.reviewer_id, sum(case when a.audit_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as returned_count, sum(case when a.audit_status = '1' and ifnull(a.review_round, 1) > 1 then 1 else 0 end) as re_review_returned_count, count(distinct case when a.audit_status = '1' then a.manuscript_id end) as returned_manuscript_count, round(avg(case when a.audit_status = '1' and a.audit_time is not null and a.invite_time is not null then timestampdiff(day, a.invite_time, a.audit_time) end), 0) as review_cycle_days, round(avg(case when a.audit_status = '1' then a.audit_score end), 1) as score_avg, round( case when count(a.audit_id) = 0 then 0 else sum(case when a.audit_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(a.audit_id) end , 0) as return_rate from editor_audit a where (a.is_deleted is null or a.is_deleted != '2')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(ifnull(a.audit_time, a.invite_time),'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{endTime},'%Y%m%d')
group by a.reviewer_id ) agg on agg.reviewer_id = rv.reviewer_id
(rv.is_deleted is null or rv.is_deleted != '2')
and coalesce(nullif(u.user_name, ''), nullif(rv.email, '')) like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(rv.real_name, ''), nullif(u.nick_name, '')) like concat('%', #{realName}, '%')
and rv.affiliation like concat('%', #{affiliation}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(rv.email, ''), nullif(u.email, '')) like concat('%', #{email}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(rv.mobile, ''), nullif(rv.phone, ''), nullif(u.phonenumber, '')) like concat('%', #{mobile}, '%')
and rv.expertise_fields like concat('%', #{expertiseFields}, '%')
and rv.research_direction like concat('%', #{searchKeywords}, '%')
and rv.status = #{permissionLevel}
order by ifnull(agg.returned_count, 0) desc, rv.reviewer_id
mapper.insert: insert into editor_manuscript ( file_no, title, author_ids, author_names, corresponding_author, corresponding_email, abstract, keywords, manuscript_type, word_count, fund_project, fund_no, status, receive_time, assign_time, review_start_time, review_end_time, conclusion, conclusion_time, editor_id, editor_name, audit_count, revision_count, is_deleted, delete_time, delete_by, archive_time, publish_time, issue_id, page_start, page_end, file_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{fileNo}, #{title}, #{authorIds}, #{authorNames}, #{correspondingAuthor}, #{correspondingEmail}, #{abstractText}, #{keywords}, #{manuscriptType}, #{wordCount}, #{fundProject}, #{fundNo}, #{status}, #{receiveTime}, #{assignTime}, #{reviewStartTime}, #{reviewEndTime}, #{conclusion}, #{conclusionTime}, #{editorId}, #{editorName}, #{auditCount}, #{revisionCount}, #{isDeleted}, #{deleteTime}, #{deleteBy}, #{archiveTime}, #{publishTime}, #{issueId}, #{pageStart}, #{pageEnd}, #{filePath}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update editor_manuscript set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where manuscript_id = #{manuscriptId}
mapper.delete: update editor_manuscript set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where manuscript_id = #{manuscriptId}

update editor_manuscript set is_deleted = '2', delete_time = sysdate() where manuscript_id in
#{manuscriptId}
